001import java.util.Stack;
002
003/**
004 * Represents the player in the game.
005 * Stores the player's current room and navigation history.
006 *
007 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
008 * @version 2026.05.09
009 */
010public class Player {
011    private String aName;
012    private Room aCurrentRoom;
013    private Stack<Room> aPreviousRooms;
014    private ItemList aItems;
015    private int aMaxWeight;
016    private int aCurrentWeight;
017    private int aMoveCount;
018    private int aMaxMoves;
019    /**
020     * Constructor for Player.
021     * @param pName the player's name
022     * @param pStartRoom the room where the player starts
023     * @param pMaxWeight the maximum weight the player can carry
024     */
025    public Player(final String pName, final Room pStartRoom, final int pMaxWeight) {
026        this.aName = pName;
027        this.aCurrentRoom = pStartRoom;
028        this.aPreviousRooms = new Stack<Room>();
029        this.aItems = new ItemList();
030        this.aMaxWeight = pMaxWeight;
031        this.aCurrentWeight = 0;
032        this.aMoveCount = 0;
033        this.aMaxMoves = 50;
034    }
035
036    /**
037     * Increments the move counter by one.
038     */
039    public void incrementMoves() {
040        this.aMoveCount++;
041    }
042
043    /**
044     * Returns true if the player has exceeded the maximum number of moves.
045     */
046    public boolean isOutOfTime() {
047        return this.aMoveCount >= this.aMaxMoves;
048    }
049
050    /**
051     * Returns the number of remaining moves.
052     */
053    public int getRemainingMoves() {
054        return this.aMaxMoves - this.aMoveCount;
055    }
056
057    /**
058     * Returns the player's name.
059     * @return the name of the player
060     */
061    public String getName() {
062        return this.aName;
063    }
064
065    /**
066     * Returns the current room of the player.
067     * @return the current Room object
068     */
069    public Room getCurrentRoom() {
070        return this.aCurrentRoom;
071    }
072
073    /**
074     * Moves the player to the given room and saves the previous one.
075     * Does nothing if pRoom is null.
076     *
077     * @param pRoom the room to move to
078     */
079    public void goTo(final Room pRoom) {
080        if (pRoom == null) return;
081        this.aPreviousRooms.push(this.aCurrentRoom);
082        this.aCurrentRoom = pRoom;
083    }
084
085    /**
086     * Moves the player back to the previous room.
087     * Returns false if there is no previous room.
088     *
089     * @return true if the player moved back, false otherwise
090     */
091    public boolean goBack() {
092        if (this.aPreviousRooms.empty()) return false;
093        this.aCurrentRoom = this.aPreviousRooms.pop();
094        return true;
095    }
096
097    /**
098     * Returns true if the player is carrying the item with the given name.
099     * @param pName the name of the item to check
100     * @return true if the item is in the inventory, false otherwise
101     */
102    public boolean hasItem(final String pName) {
103        return this.aItems.contains(pName);
104    }
105
106    /**
107     * Returns true if the player is carrying at least one item.
108     * @return true if inventory is not empty, false otherwise
109     */
110    public boolean hasItems() {
111        return !this.aItems.isEmpty();
112    }
113
114    /**
115     * Makes the player pick up the given item.
116     * @param pItem the Item to pick up
117     */
118    public boolean pickUp(final Item pItem) {
119        if (this.aCurrentWeight + pItem.getWeight() > this.aMaxWeight) {
120            return false;
121        }
122
123        this.aItems.addItem(pItem);
124        this.aCurrentWeight += pItem.getWeight();
125        return true;
126    }
127
128    /**
129     * Removes and returns the item with the given name from the inventory.
130     * Returns null if the player is not carrying that item.
131     * @param pName the name of the item to drop
132     * @return the dropped Item, or null if not found
133     */
134    public Item drop(final String pName) {
135        Item vDropped = this.aItems.removeItem(pName);
136        if (vDropped != null) {
137            this.aCurrentWeight -= vDropped.getWeight();
138        }
139        return vDropped;
140    }
141
142    /**
143     * Removes the item with the given name from the player's inventory.
144     * @param pName the name of the item to remove
145     */
146    public void removeItem(final String pName) {
147        this.aItems.removeItem(pName);
148    }
149
150    /**
151     * Returns a string listing all items carried by the player.
152     * @return a description of the player's inventory
153     */
154    public String getInventoryString() {
155        return this.aItems.getInventoryString();
156    }
157
158    /**
159     * Returns a string describing the current and maximum weight carried by the player.
160     * @return a string representation of the carried weight
161     */
162    public String getWeightString() {
163        return "Weight carried : " + this.aCurrentWeight + "/" + this.aMaxWeight;
164    }
165
166    /**
167     * Updates the player's maximum carrying capacity.
168     * @param pMaxWeight the new maximum weight
169     */
170    public void setMaxWeight(final int pMaxWeight) {
171        this.aMaxWeight = pMaxWeight;
172    }
173
174    /**
175     * Returns the player's maximum carrying capacity.
176     * @return the maximum weight
177     */
178    public int getMaxWeight() {
179        return this.aMaxWeight;
180    }
181
182    /**
183     * Returns the item with the given name without removing it.
184     * Returns null if not found.
185     * @param pName the name of the item
186     */
187    public Item getItem(final String pName) {
188        return this.aItems.getItem(pName);
189    }
190} // Player
